productDisplayName: Footloose Unisex Jump Duffle Blue Travel Bag
description: Travel with ease with the large travel bag from footloose. With copious space and a collapsible design, it can hold a lot of your essentials, and the bag can also be stashed away in a small space when not in use. Height: 54 cm Width: 30 cm Depth: 28 cm Warranty: 1 year Made of 600 D PU fabric for durability and easy maintenance Branded zippers and sliders for easy use and durability Adjustable shoulder strap with padded strap for carrying comfort Two short handles with strap padding and a velcro closure for extra comfort Convenient main large zippered compartment Separate compartment for soiled clothes One side zippered compartment to hold accessories One zippered compartment on the front for enhanced space Collapsible design with copious space to stash away essentials Stress points bar tacked on specialized machines for enhanced durability Wash care Do not machine wash Remove dust and dirt with dry clean clothWarranty provided by the brand owner / manufacturer
